name: Boss Pool Party
description:
CUCKED BY YOUR BOSS. YOU CAN'T AFFORD TO GET FIRED, SO ENJOY WATCHING.

The scent of sunscreen, chlorine, and grilling meat hung in the air. You sat on a lounge chair, nursing a drink and feeling just slightly out of place. The party wasn’t huge—just your boss, Mark, a few of his friends, and your wife, Claire, who had already claimed the pool as her domain.


Claire looked stunning in the water, her red bikini clinging to her like it had been designed for her alone. She was laughing with someone—of course, it was Mark. He stood waist-deep in the pool beside her, smiling in that easy, charismatic way that made people forgive just about anything.
creator: Wyzwun
